title: Special Education Mild/Moderate and 7th Grade Math Teacher
status: Full Time, 1 FTE  (.6 FTE Special Education Teacher & .4 FTE 7th Grade Math Teacher)Minimum Requirements:An Active Utah Special Education K-12 License AND an active Elementary or Secondary License with Middle School Math Endorsement required.  Mild/Moderate Endorsement preferred.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. To estimate possible step placement on the TT Salary Schedule, select following linkTT Step Placement Calculator.Attachment(s):Secondary Education Teacher.pdfSpecial Education Teacher.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
